3155330.name: Zombie Survivors Demo
3155330.description:
In this electrifying game, you will collect cards and evolve your characters to become powerful enough to eliminate entire hordes of zombies.

Zombie Survivors is an action and survival roguelite where you have to fight and defeat thousands of zombies and other monsters that appear to devour you.

  • Collect gold and gems to buy improvements.
  • Unlock Pets with unique abilities to help you defeat hordes of enemies.
  • Unlock new characters.
  • Collect cards and evolve them to improve their attributes.
3155330.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
